findings.issue: App Store CTA returns HTTP 404 (invalid App Store URL format, marked // TODO confirm)
findings.fix: Set the live App Store URL or hide the button until the iOS app is published

findings.issue: Google Play CTA returns HTTP 404 (package not published / wrong id)
findings.fix: Confirm published package id or hide the button

findings.current: "Elias Thorne" / "GHOST STUDIO // NYC" testimonial with images.unsplash.com stock portrait
findings.issue: Fabricated customer testimonial + stock photo presented as a real endorsement (FTC deceptive-endorsement risk)
findings.fix: Remove, or replace with a real consented quote/photo, or reframe as clearly illustrative

findings.current: 1.38 MB hero PNG @440x440 loading=eager; 4,092 KiB page; LCP 17.5s mobile (perf 74)
findings.issue: Unoptimized PNGs drive homepage mobile LCP to 17.5s
findings.fix: Use astro:assets <Image>/WebP-AVIF at ~2x display size; expect LCP < 2.5s

findings.current: axe color-contrast serious: home 27 / terms 43 / privacy 35 nodes
findings.issue: Low-contrast mono labels on dark bg fail WCAG AA
findings.fix: Raise to neutral-400/300 or larger weight to clear 4.5:1

findings.current: Buy Credits / Start trial / Download all href="#download"
findings.issue: Conversion CTAs scroll to footer with the two dead store links; no live web purchase path
findings.fix: Point credit-pack CTAs at the live USDC web checkout URL

findings.issue: Omits fonts.googleapis.com -> CSP console error on every page (fonts still render via style-src)
findings.fix: Add https://fonts.googleapis.com to connect-src

findings.issue: Unused CDN origins widen attack surface (not referenced anywhere in source)
findings.fix: Remove unpkg.com and cdn.jsdelivr.net from all CSP directives

findings.current: 307 redirect /artists->/artists/; canonical/og:url omit slash; header links omit slash
findings.issue: Canonical disagrees with sitemap (slash); header clicks eat a 307 redirect; temporary (307) not permanent (308)
findings.fix: trailingSlash:'always' + build.format:'directory'; make redirect 308

findings.issue: Counsel approved 2026-05-12; doc amended 2026-06-07 & 2026-06-09; re-review outstanding (per project memory)
findings.fix: Obtain+record re-approval or change badge to 'Current'/remove

findings.current: "Four Distinct Vocabularies" vs "10 distinct style engines"
findings.issue: Self-inconsistent style count: human sees 4, structured data/FAQ say 10
findings.fix: Reframe headline to ten, or label the 4 as a selection

findings.current: FAQ schema: '5/day monthly, 10/day annual'; featureList claims not shown on page
findings.issue: Structured-data claims not visible to users (Google FAQ policy); risk if numbers wrong
findings.fix: Surface limits in visible copy or remove from schema; verify featureList

findings.current: axe definition-list/dlitem serious: privacy 18, terms 4, delete-account 2
findings.issue: <dt>/<dd> not correctly wrapped in <dl> -> SR can't announce term/definition
findings.fix: Wrap each group in a single <dl> with only <dt>/<dd> children

findings.current: "...the same starting point StencilMaker turns into clean, vector-grade transfer linework"
findings.issue: Implies Bruno uses the product; contradicts consts.ts:97-100 'we do NOT claim he uses StencilMaker'
findings.fix: Reframe as the proposition for artists like Bruno, not his own workflow

findings.issue: Paid/material connection not disclosed (consts.ts:97 = paid partner) - FTC
findings.fix: Add 'paid': 'Bruno is a paid featured partner'

findings.current: 'not retained beyond generation' vs 'Purged 24 hours after generation'
findings.issue: Internal contradiction on Free-tier retention
findings.fix: Align Uploads copy to the 24-hour window

findings.issue: Apple 5.1.1(v)/GDPR/CCPA expect export option; memory: export is email-channel by design (should be stated)
findings.fix: Add: email us for a copy of your data before deletion

findings.current: warning covers App Store/Google Play subs only
findings.issue: Omits that web/USDC credit packs are forfeited (non-refundable) on deletion
findings.fix: Add credit-forfeit note

findings.current: sameAs: twitter/instagram/tiktok @stencilmaker (comment: TODO add real URLs once live)
findings.issue: Unverified/likely-placeholder social profiles in Organization markup
findings.fix: Verify accounts exist or remove from sameAs and clear twitterHandle

findings.current: privacy@ (privacy) and legal@ (terms) not defined in consts.ts
findings.issue: Policy commits to responding at mailboxes whose liveness is unverified
findings.fix: Confirm privacy@ and legal@ are live monitored aliases (or route to support@)

findings.issue: Unverifiable static compliance assertion; guidelines change
findings.fix: Soften to 'designed to meet'/'intended to comply with'

findings.current: "Join professional artists who have upgraded their workflow"
findings.issue: Unsubstantiated; implies existing user base
findings.fix: Reframe aspirationally or substantiate

findings.issue: Unsubstantiated trust claim (near-invisible)
findings.fix: Drop/neutralize

findings.issue: Can read as 600; 550 is the total (math correct)
findings.fix: Clarify '550 total (incl. 50 bonus)'

findings.issue: Non-standard spacing
Heading level skipped
findings.fix: Fix heading hierarchy

findings.issue: Icon-only link without accessible name
findings.fix: Add aria-label

findings.issue: Implementation detail in public legal copy
findings.fix: Plain-language it

findings.current: "On the Web app? ... the same steps apply"
findings.issue: Mobile steps don't apply to web
findings.fix: Reword for web path

findings.issue: Stale TODOs (webAppUrl resolves 200)
findings.fix: Resolve/remove

findings.issue: Web purchases have no App Store/Google Play refund backstop
findings.fix: Add all-sales-final/non-refundable line for USDC packs

findings.issue: Stale comment; deployed on Workers Static Assets
findings.fix: Update comment

findings.issue: Internal file/flag names in source comments (not rendered; leak risk via source maps)
findings.fix: Move to internal doc

findings.issue: No www->apex redirect; www errors out (apex serves 200)
findings.fix: Add www->apex 301 redirect rule

findings.current: Silent log (HTTP 200) if LEADS_KV unbound; email skipped if any Resend var missing
findings.issue: Apply form delivery fails silently on misconfig; not probed live
findings.fix: Send one test application to confirm persistence+email; return 500 when no storage bound

false_positives: SEO meta 'missing' on 6/7 pages — artifact of not following the 307 trailing-slash redirect; all pages have full unique meta
Starter pack '27 stencils should be 30' — credits:550 is the total; floor(550/20)=27 is correct and consistent (1100->55, 3000->150)
Turnstile widget absent / form bypass — cf-turnstile IS present in rendered /artists/apply/
Mobile overlaps/clipping (6-18 per legal page) — text-reflow bbox intersections + carousel slides; overflowPx=0, screenshots clean
Web App footer link dead — app.thestencilmaker.com returns 200
